{{Quote|I've invested way too much into [spice mining] to see it all dry up.|Calquad Dominé|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Calquad Dominé''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Naboo Moon Mining Union]] and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] transport ''[[Pickaxe]]''. In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] he protested the opening of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] main ports to refugee transports by refusing to move his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] from [[Slip 45-J]] in [[Kwilaan Starport/Legends|Kwilaan Starport]].<ref name="HNN" />

{{Char-stub}}
